title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
